meaning_en: to recognize the value or significance of something; to be grateful for something

examples.en: I really appreciate your help.

meaning_en: slightly angry or irritated

meaning_en: feeling worried or nervous about something

examples.en: He felt anxious before the exam.

common_mistakes.correct: I am anxious about the result.

meaning_en: feeling shame or embarrassment about something

examples.en: She was ashamed of her mistake.

common_mistakes.correct: I am ashamed of my behavior.

meaning_en: feeling sure about your own abilities or qualities

examples.en: She is confident about passing the test.

meaning_en: unable to understand or think clearly

meaning_en: feeling or showing great pleasure

examples.en: We were delighted with the news.

common_mistakes.correct: I am delighted to meet you.

meaning_en: feeling very sad and without hope

meaning_en: feeling strong dislike or disapproval
